title: SABA Launches an RFP for Sustainable Aviation Fuel Certificates (SAFc) to Address Emissions From Participant Travel to the 30th United Nations Climate Change Conference (COP30)
content: SABA has launched an RFP for Sustainable Aviation Fuel certificates (SAFc) to address emissions from participant travel to the 30th United Nations Climate Change Conference (COP30), taking place this November in Brazil. COP30 marks a pivotal moment in the global climate movement. As world leaders, negotiators, scientists, and civil society come together to accelerate action, this is also a powerful opportunity to lead by exampleâ€”by reducing the environmental impact of international convenings. Attendees procuring SAF certificates to address their aviation emissions is one meaningful way to do just that.
author: Analysts Account
